subcodes.first_line: The Ancient Essence beareth witness unto His Most Great Name that there is none other God but Him, and whoso hesiteth in His Cause, verily he is [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: شهد کینونه القدم لاسمه الاعظم انه لا اله الا هو و الذی توقف فی امره انه لهو
subcodes.subjects: @high station of the true believer, @chastisement and requital, @call to action, @knowledge; recognition of God, @station of the Manifestation of God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
